name: Green Papaya Saald
recipeIngredient: 2 dried red chilies, soaked and chopped (remove seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mortar, pound the garlic, chilies, and sugar into a paste.
2. Mix in the soy sauce and lemon juice.
3. Combine the papaya, green beans, and refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. At serving time, pour the dressing over the mixture and sprinkle the peanuts and cherry tomatoes on top.
5. Serve with pieces of raw cabbage leaves.
